read_file -> ---
import '../styles/global.css';

interface Props {
    title?: string;
}

const { title = 'SHUEI KOMURO | PORTFOLIO' } = Astro.props;
---

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ja">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{title}</title>

    <!-- Lucide Icons -->
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest" is:inline></script>

    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+San...
